expectations.evidence: resource_directory.module: $data['resource_links']['table']['group'] = t('Resource Directory'). Group key present.

expectations.text: Custom filter plugin placed in src/Plugin/views/filter/ directory
expectations.evidence: ResourceCategoryFilter.php placed at src/Plugin/views/filter/ResourceCategoryFilter.php -- correct PSR-4 path.
ResourceCategoryFilter extends FilterPluginBase. Implements valueForm(), query(), adminSummary() methods.

expectations.text: hook_views_data() includes correct field definitions with title and help text
expectations.evidence: All 5 fields have 'title' and 'help' text with appropriate handlers.
resource_directory.install: hook_schema() defines resource_links with all required columns. Primary key on id, index on category.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en resource_directory returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Module confirmed enabled via ddev drush pm:list --status=enabled showing (resource_directory).

expectations.text: E2E: Views integration registered -- Views admin accessible
expectations.evidence: Module enabled with drupal:views dependency. Views admin accessible.

claims.claim: Uses D10 @ViewsFilter annotation instead of D11 attribute

claims.evidence: hook_views_data() is in resource_directory.module, not in .views.inc file. This means the function is always loaded, not lazy-loaded.

suggestions: Add expectation for .views.inc separation to differentiate skill impact
Without-skill code is functional but misses performance optimization (lazy loading)
eval_feedback.overall: All 7 expectations pass. Without-skill is solid but uses D10 annotation, FilterPluginBase instead of InOperator, and .module instead of .views.inc.
